title: eragrostis cassa
intro: Eragrostis cassa, also known as Desert Lovergrass, is a type of grass native to the deserts of the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Eragrostis cassa include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as potential antimicrobial and antifungal properties. Eragrostis cassa can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in folk remedies for its supposed ability to treat various ailments.
